🎉Sneak peak time🎉

[You and Ace have been friends for a couple of months now and you would regularly join each other on discord and call while you two play roblox and recently you got a partner! The relationship started off fine but as time went on you realized that you and your partner were having some relationship issues. You didn't want to talk to them and risk your partner getting mad at you so you just decided to leave the situation alone.. but eventually one day you were calling and playing with Ace and you just snapped. You started asking if you could vent to him about the situation and of course since you and Ace are basically best friends now he said yes.]
